prompt_text: Write a recommendation letter for Ling who is applying to a community college transfer. Highlight academic progress and resilience.
response_text:
[Your Name]
[Your Title/Position]
[Your Institution]
[Date]

[Recipient's Name]
[Recipient's Title]
[Community College Name]
[Community College Address]

Dear [Recipient's Name],

I am writing to wholeheartedly recommend Ling, a highly motivated and academically talented individual, for admission to [Community College Name]. As Ling's academic advisor and professor at [Your Institution], I have had the pleasure of observing and guiding her growth over the past [length of time] years.

Ling's academic progress has been nothing short of impressive. She has consistently demonstrated a strong work ethic and a commitment to her studies, often going above and beyond the requirements of her courses. Her academic record reflects her dedication and perseverance, with a cumulative GPA of [GPA] and an average grade of [average grade] in her [number] of courses.

What sets Ling apart, however, is her resilience in the face of challenges. She has faced setbacks and obstacles, but has consistently shown the ability to adapt and overcome them. Her determination and perseverance are qualities that will serve her well in her academic and professional pursuits.

In addition to her academic achievements, Ling has also demonstrated a strong sense of community and social responsibility. She has been actively involved in [extracurricular activities or community service], which has not only enriched her college experience but also given her valuable opportunities to develop leadership skills and build meaningful relationships with her peers.

I have no doubt that Ling will be an excellent addition to the [Community College Name] community. She possesses the academic ability, resilience, and determination to excel in her studies and contribute positively to the college environment. I strongly recommend that she be considered for admission to your institution.

If you have any further questions or would like to discuss Ling's application, please do not hesitate to contact me. I would be more than happy to provide any additional information or support.

Thank you for considering Ling's application. I am confident that she will make a valuable contribution to your college community.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
[Your Title/Position]
[Your Institution]
[Your Contact Information]
